hero.title: Hi, I’m Dival Sehgal
hero.subtitle: Frontend Engineer — I build fast, scalable interfaces with Next.js, React, TypeScript and custom design systems.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a frontend engineer who loves building clean, performant UIs with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
I enjoy creating scalable design systems, working on large-scale architectures, and building tools that improve developer workflows.
With a strong focus on performance and accessibility,

description.text: Migrated the Advisor Dashboard into a data-driven insights platform with charts and analytics metrics, improving engagement by 25%.
Revamped Advisor Onboarding from Ember.js to Next.js, integrating Tipalti and Jumio for tax verification.
Built a Node.js microservice connected to BI pipelines to serve real-time analytics for the Advisor Dashboard.
Migrated key pages and integrated Zendesk Chatbot, increasing customer support efficiency by 30%.
Managed the Shukran Delivery Project for maxfashion and homecentre, resulting in a 25% increase in on-time deliveries.
Enhanced Flash Sales and Recommendations features, leading to a 30% boost in user engagement.
Revamped area location and product listing filters, improving accessibility and discoverability by 20%.
Optimized performance using Lighthouse reports, reducing load times and decreasing bounce rate by 20%.
Developed KYC Dashboard for Stanza Living to manage booking requests across multiple platforms.
Built an Ad Campaign Dashboard with analytics and automation, improving campaign efficiency.
Implemented role-based routing and an atomic component structure for Narayan Edtech’s platform.
Developed an internal Shuttle Service App with an Admin Dashboard for managing cab bookings and seat allocation.

projects.name: Excel Clone
projects.description: Features a familiar spreadsheet interface, supporting cell editing, formulas, and formatting.

projects.name: RPC Game
projects.description: Socket-powered Rock Paper Scissors game, hosting two players at a time while others await their turn.

projects.name: Booking Clone
projects.description: A full stack hotel booking application with searching and management features.

projects.name: YT Bookmarker
projects.description: Chrome extension for saving and managing YouTube video timestamps.

metadata.title: Dival Sehgal | Frontend Engineer
